payload.reason: Shipped --blocked-by (repeatable, dedups) and act_file_blocker MCP tool. Single atomic commit via WriteOpsAndAutoCommit with rollback. Deviation: --block-parent NOT implemented per Andrew's design call — workflow A continues via act_block after create, keeping dep direction unambiguous. Reviewer fixes inline (self-loop guard, JSON round-trip in test). Cross-cutting follow-up filed as act-c22b (WriteOpsAndAutoCommit rollback noise — affects act_block too).
